case_title: JUAN PABLO JIMENEZ VS. HENRY BENITEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, JUAN PABLO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JIMENEZ, JUAN PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT BENITEZ, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS DENIED,[X] PLAINTIFF REQUIRED TO APPEAR TO DISCUSS FAILURE TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SEE SERVICE - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00) SERVED JAN-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BENITEZ, HENRY
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY; R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUAN PABLO JIMENEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HENRY BENITEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY FILED BY ONE DAY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WITNESS VICTOR JIMENEZ IS PRESENT. HONORABLE JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS THE PLAINTIFF MUST AMEND CLAIM TO INCLUDE ENTITY THAT CLAIMS A LIEN (ON THE CAR) ON GROUNDS THAT PLAINTIFF CLAIMS THE LIEN IS INVALID AND DID NOT JUSTIFY ALLEGED LIENHOLDER'S SEIZURE OF AUTOMOBILE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-08-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUAN PABLO JIMENEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HENRY BENITEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO AMEND CLAIM TO INCLUDE THE PARTY THAT BELIEVES IT HAS HAS LIEN, AND RE-SERVE ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
